topPatterns.pattern: agent_version.nodes[1].before_reasoning_iteration[1].state_updates[0].AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions: module-agentscript="template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}\nAsk the following killer question: {{state.killer_questions[state.killer_questions_index]}} This is question {{state.killer_questions_index + 1}} of {{len(state.killer_questions)}}. Evaluate the candidate's answer professionally. A killer question is critical - if the answer doesn't match requirements, the candidate may not be suitable for the position. If the answer is satisfactory, then save the answer by calling 'record_answer' tool. If the candidate explicitly states they want to end the interview, confirm if they want to stop and end the interview and call the 'end_interview' tool.", agent-dsl="template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}\nAsk the following killer question: {{state.killer_questions[state.killer_questions_index]}} This is question {{state.killer_questions_index + 1}} of {{state.killer_questions.length}}. Evaluate the candidate's answer professionally. A killer question is critical - if the answer doesn't match requirements, the candidate may not be suitable for the position. If the answer is satisfactory, then save the answer by calling 'record_answer' tool. If the candidate explicitly states they want to end the interview, confirm if they want to stop and end the interview and call the 'end_interview' tool."

topCosmeticPatterns.pattern: agent_version.nodes[3].action_definitions[0].input_type[1].description: module-agentscript="Assign a Qualification Status to the Candidate, based on your assessment of the conversation. Use one of the following values:\"Interested\"\"Qualified\"\"Not Qualified\"\"Not Interested\"\"Location not accepted\"\"Decline to answer questions\".Use \"Interested\" as soon as the conversation starts, then use other value to qualify where the conversation goes. Be sure to complete the assessment even if you set a Qualification Status.", agent-dsl="Assign a Qualification Status to the Candidate, based on your assessment of the conversation. Use one of the following values:\\n\"Interested\"\\n\"Qualified\"\\n\"Not Qualified\"\\n\"Not Interested\"\\n\"Location not accepted\"\\n\"Decline to answer questions\".\\nUse \"Interested\" as soon as the conversation starts, then use other value to qualify where the conversation goes. Be sure to complete the assessment even if you set a Qualification Status."

agent_version.nodes[3].action_definitions[0].input_type[2].description: module-agentscript="Assign a Technical Status, based on the progress of the conversation. Use one of the following values:\"Completed\"\"Too Many Connection Attempts\"Use \"Completed\" as soon as the qualification process is finished or candidate mentions they want to stop or is not interested. Then use other value if Conversation Background retrieval do not provide any information or is considered ungrounded more than twice.", agent-dsl="Assign a Technical Status, based on the progress of the conversation. Use one of the following values:\\n\"Completed\"\\n\"Too Many Connection Attempts\"\\n\\nUse \"Completed\" as soon as the qualification process is finished or candidate mentions they want to stop or is not interested. Then use other value if Conversation Background retrieval do not provide any information or is considered ungrounded more than twice."
